title: Chewy Moroccan Galangal Stir-fry
description: A fresh, chewy post-workout dish featuring galangal paste in a low-fat-friendly recipe.
instructions: In a large bowl, mix galangal paste with olive oil and lemon juice. Add cubed sweet potatoes and broccoli florets; toss until evenly coated.
Spread the coated vegetables on a baking sheet lined with parchment paper.
Roast in preheated oven at 450°F for 12-15 minutes, stirring halfway through cooking time.
Meanwhile, sauté minced garlic and grated ginger in 1 tbsp of olive oil until fragrant. Add tomato sauce to the pan, stir well and reduce by half.
Add roasted vegetables back into the pan with the tomato sauce mixture, tossing gently.
Season with salt and pepper to taste. Remove from heat and serve.
